mainEntity.name: What is the difference between Google AI Overviews citations and traditional SEO rankings for LA lawyers?
mainEntity.text: What is the difference between Google AI Overviews citations and traditional SEO rankings for LA lawyers?

acceptedAnswer.text: Google AI Overviews cites synthesized top-ranked pages above organic results, favoring SEO-heavy firms in consumer law like LA personal injury, while traditional SEO drives clicks from lower positions. AI appears on 78% of high-intent queries, boosting visibility without clicks.

suggestedAnswer.text: In Los Angeles, AI Overviews inherit search biases toward review-rich, optimized sites, often listing consumer attorneys over BigLaw. Traditional SEO builds long-term traffic; AI offers instant exposure but depends on competitors' marketing. LA lawyers should audit rankings and create AI-targeted content to capture both.

name: AI Overviews vs Traditional SEO for Los Angeles Lawyers
